title: astragalus koelzii
intro: Astragalus koelzii, a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, is native to the high-altitude grasslands and rocky slopes of the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Astragalus koelzii include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and prevent illness in traditional Chinese medicine.
